examples.title: Anatomy
examples.html: Top 10 hiking trails Discover popular trails
examples.top:
M3e.appBar []
    [ M3e.slotLeading (M3e.iconButton [ M3e.ariaLabel "Back" ] [ M3e.icon [ M3e.attrName "arrow_back" ] [] ])
    , M3e.slotTitle (Native.span [] [ Kit.text "Top 10 hiking trails" ])
    , M3e.slotSubtitle (Native.span [] [ Kit.text "Discover popular trails" ])
    , M3e.slotTrailing
        (M3e.iconButton
            [ M3e.ariaLabel "Bookmark"
            , M3e.variantTonal
            ]
            [ M3e.icon
                [ M3e.attrName "bookmark"
                , M3e.attrFilled True
                ]
                []
            ]
        )
    ]

examples.title: Basic usage
examples.html:
<m3e-form-field>
  <label slot="label" for="fruit">Choose your favorite fruit</label>
  <input id="fruit">
</m3e-form-field>
<m3e-autocomplete for="fruit">
  <m3e-option>Apples</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Oranges</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Bananas</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Grapes</m3e-option>
</m3e-autocomplete>

[ M3e.FormField.view []

examples.title: Filter modes
examples.html:
<m3e-form-field>
  <label slot="label" for="fruit5">Choose your favorite fruit</label>
  <input id="fruit5">
</m3e-form-field>
<m3e-autocomplete for="fruit5" filter="starts-with" case-sensitive="">
  <m3e-option>Apples</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Oranges</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Bananas</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Grapes</m3e-option>
</m3e-autocomplete>

    , M3e.Autocomplete.filter M3e.Token.startsWith

    <m3e-icon name="edit"></m3e-icon>
  </m3e-fab-menu-trigger>
</m3e-fab>
<m3e-fab-menu id="fabmenu" variant="primary">
  <m3e-fab-menu-item>

<m3e-form-field>
  <label slot="label" for="select1">Favorite fruit</label>
  <m3e-select id="select1">
    <m3e-option>Apples</m3e-option>
    <m3e-option>Oranges</m3e-option>
    <m3e-option>Bananas</m3e-option>
    <m3e-option>Grapes</m3e-option>

</m3e-form-field>

examples.title: Anatomy
examples.html:
<m3e-split-button>
  <m3e-button slot="leading-button"><m3e-icon slot="icon" name="edit"></m3e-icon>Edit</m3e-button>
  <m3e-icon-button slot="trailing-button">
    <m3e-icon name="keyboard_arrow_down"></m3e-icon>
    <m3e-menu-trigger for="menu"></m3e-menu-trigger>
  </m3e-icon-button>
</m3e-split-button>
<m3e-menu id="menu" position-x="before">
  <m3e-menu-item>Rename</m3e-menu-item>
  <m3e-menu-item>Copy</m3e-menu-item>
  <m3e-menu-item>Delete</m3e-menu-item>
</m3e-menu>

examples.title: Variants
examples.html:
<m3e-split-button variant="filled">
  <m3e-button slot="leading-button"><m3e-icon slot="icon" name="edit"></m3e-icon>Edit</m3e-button>
  <m3e-icon-button slot="trailing-button">
    <m3e-icon name="keyboard_arrow_down"></m3e-icon>
    <m3e-menu-trigger for="menu1"></m3e-menu-trigger>
  </m3e-icon-button>
</m3e-split-button>
<m3e-split-button variant="tonal">
  <m3e-button slot="leading-button"><m3e-icon slot="icon" name="edit"></m3e-icon>Edit</m3e-button>
  <m3e-icon-button slot="trailing-button">
    <m3e-icon name="keyboard_arrow_down"></m3e-icon>
    <m3e-menu-trigger for="menu1"></m3e-menu-trigger>
  </m3e-icon-button>

<label><m3e-switch disabled></m3e-switch> Disabled Switch 1</label>
<m3e-switch id="chk3" disabled></m3e-switch>
<label for="chk3"> Disabled Switch 2</label>

examples.title: Basic usage
examples.html:
<m3e-tabs>
  <m3e-tab selected for="videos"><m3e-icon slot="icon" name="videocam"></m3e-icon>Video</m3e-tab>
  <m3e-tab for="photos"><m3e-icon slot="icon" name="photo"></m3e-icon>Photos</m3e-tab>
  <m3e-tab for="audio"><m3e-icon slot="icon" name="music_note"></m3e-icon>Audio</m3e-tab>
  <m3e-tab-panel id="videos">Videos</m3e-tab-panel>
  <m3e-tab-panel id="photos">Photos</m3e-tab-panel>
  <m3e-tab-panel id="audio">Audio</m3e-tab-panel>
</m3e-tabs>
examples.top:
M3e.tabs []
    [ M3e.tab
        [ M3e.attrSelected True
        , M3e.attrFor "videos"
        ]
        [ M3e.slotIcon (M3e.icon [ M3e.attrName "videocam" ] [])
        , Kit.text "Video"
        ]
    , M3e.tab [ M3e.attrFor "photos" ]
        [ M3e.slotIcon (M3e.icon [ M3e.attrName "photo" ] [])
        , Kit.text "Photos"
        ]
    , M3e.tab [ M3e.attrFor "audio" ]
        [ M3e.slotIcon (M3e.icon [ M3e.attrName "music_note" ] [])
        , Kit.text "Audio"
        ]
    , M3e.slotPanel (M3e.tabPanel [ M3e.Attributes.id "videos" ] [ Kit.text "Videos" ])
    , M3e.slotPanel (M3e.tabPanel [ M3e.Attributes.id "photos" ] [ Kit.text "Photos" ])
    , M3e.slotPanel (M3e.tabPanel [ M3e.Attributes.id "audio" ] [ Kit.text "Audio" ])
    ]

examples.title: Density
examples.html:
<m3e-theme strong-focus="" density="-3">
  <m3e-button variant="filled" size="medium">-3 density</m3e-button>
</m3e-theme>
<m3e-theme strong-focus="" density="-2">
  <m3e-button variant="filled" size="medium">-2 density</m3e-button>
</m3e-theme>
<m3e-theme strong-focus="" density="-1">
  <m3e-button variant="filled" size="medium">-1 density</m3e-button>
</m3e-theme>
<m3e-theme strong-focus="" density="0">
  <m3e-button variant="filled" size="medium">0 (default) density</m3e-button>
</m3e-theme>
<m3e-theme strong-focus="" density="1">
  <m3e-button variant="filled" size="medium">1 density</m3e-button>
</m3e-theme>
examples.build:
[ M3e.Theme.view
    [ M3e.Theme.strongFocus True
    , M3e.Theme.density -3
    ]
    [ M3e.Build.Button.button
        { content = Kit.text "-3 density"
        , action = M3e.Action.none
        }
        |> M3e.Build.Button.variant M3e.Token.filled
        |> M3e.Build.Button.size M3e.Token.medium
        |> M3e.Build.Button.build
    ]
, M3e.Theme.view
    [ M3e.Theme.strongFocus True
    , M3e.Theme.density -2
    ]
    [ M3e.Build.Button.button
        { content = Kit.text "-2 density"
        , action = M3e.Action.none
        }
        |> M3e.Build.Button.variant M3e.Token.filled
        |> M3e.Build.Button.size M3e.Token.medium
        |> M3e.Build.Button.build
    ]
, M3e.Theme.view
    [ M3e.Theme.strongFocus True
    , M3e.Theme.density -1
    ]
    [ M3e.Build.Button.button
        { content = Kit.text "-1 density"
        , action = M3e.Action.none
        }
        |> M3e.Build.Button.variant M3e.Token.filled
        |> M3e.Build.Button.size M3e.Token.medium
        |> M3e.Build.Button.build
    ]
, M3e.Theme.view
    [ M3e.Theme.strongFocus True
    , M3e.Theme.density 0
    ]
    [ M3e.Build.Button.button
        { content = Kit.text "0 (default) density"
        , action = M3e.Action.none
        }
        |> M3e.Build.Button.variant M3e.Token.filled
        |> M3e.Build.Button.size M3e.Token.medium
        |> M3e.Build.Button.build
    ]
, M3e.Theme.view
    [ M3e.Theme.strongFocus True
    , M3e.Theme.density 1
    ]
    [ M3e.Build.Button.button
        { content = Kit.text "1 density"
        , action = M3e.Action.none
        }
        |> M3e.Build.Button.variant M3e.Token.filled
        |> M3e.Build.Button.size M3e.Token.medium
        |> M3e.Build.Button.build
    ]
]

M3e.Toolbar.view [ M3e.Attributes.class "density-3" ]

        { content = M3e.Icon.view [ M3e.Icon.name "arrow_back" ] []
        , action = M3e.Action.none
        }
        |> M3e.Build.IconButton.build
    , M3e.Build.IconButton.iconButton
        { content = M3e.Icon.view [ M3e.Icon.name "arrow_forward" ] []
        , action = M3e.Action.none
        }
        |> M3e.Build.IconButton.build
    , M3e.Build.IconButton.iconButton
        { content = M3e.Icon.view [ M3e.Icon.name "add" ] []
        , action = M3e.Action.none
        }
        |> M3e.Build.IconButton.width M3e.Token.wide
        |> M3e.Build.IconButton.variant M3e.Token.filled
        |> M3e.Build.IconButton.build
    , M3e.Build.IconButton.iconButton
        { content = M3e.Icon.view [ M3e.Icon.name "picture_in_picture" ] []
        , action = M3e.Action.none
        }
        |> M3e.Build.IconButton.build
    , M3e.Build.IconButton.iconButton
        { content = M3e.Icon.view [ M3e.Icon.name "more_vert" ] []
        , action = M3e.Action.none
        }
        |> M3e.Build.IconButton.build
    ]

examples.title: Plain tooltip
examples.html:
<m3e-icon-button id="button">
  <m3e-icon name="arrow_back"></m3e-icon>
</m3e-icon-button>
<m3e-tooltip for="button">Go Back</m3e-tooltip>

examples.title: Delays
examples.html:
<m3e-icon-button id="button">

</m3e-icon-button>
<m3e-tooltip for="button" show-delay="0" hide-delay="200">Go Back</m3e-tooltip>

[ M3e.iconButton [ M3e.Attributes.id "button" ] [ M3e.icon [ M3e.attrName "arrow_back" ] [] ]
, M3e.tooltip

    , M3e.attrHideDelay 200

    [ Kit.text "Go Back" ]
]
